highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offer best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Best education. Good faculty. Incomplete infrastructure. Mess is not good.

review_content.Placements: As we are discussing an MBBS degree, talking about placement and packages is inappropriate. It is itself a job-creating degree. However, we can talk about the education, which is excellent here. It makes it easier to acquire a seat in NEET PG. In 2022, Urvashi Sachan topped all universities in UP; she is from the 2021 batch, proving the education level of ASMC Fatehpur.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not fully complete yet. The boys' hostel, girls' hostel, and college building are complete. The hospital has an OPD running but no emergency or IPD. The faculty residences are complete, but the interns' residence is incomplete, and the JRs' residence is partially complete. The ground and indoor games facilities are incomplete. The library is complete, and cultural events occur regularly.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. CSE in Data Science - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The college has very good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: There are not many good placements at this college. Last year, the maximum package for the B.Tech. was INR 13,000 per month. review_summary.college_name: Maya Group of Colleges Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Maya Group of Colleges offers quality education, modern facilities, and experienced faculty members.

content.Placements: Students should score 60-70% above in academics to become eligible for placements. The lowest package is 2 LPA and the average package offered ranges from 5-6 LPA. The university successfully conducts placement drives with companies like Amazon, Wipro, TCS, Accenture, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. The cafeteria is available and hostels are good. The campus is also good. Both girl's and boys' hostels are available with an average fee of 1.3 lakhs. The hostel is equipped with 24x7 hour electricity and water supply.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Advance Institute of Science and Technology.

content.Placements: There are 60 students in my class. The highest package is 25 lakhs, the lowest is 4 lakhs, and the average package is 10 lakhs. Companies like Amazon, Tata, ECL, HDFC, etc. come for a placement drive at our college. Like, almost every student gets internships. Different companies offer different roles, like HR, manager, marketing head, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There are different facilities available in our department, including Wi-Fi, smart classes, labs with different equipment, a big central library in each department, seminar halls, etc. Hostel rooms are big. They offer two kinds of rooms: a three-sharing room or a two-sharing room. Food is good. They serve different foods on different days. The menu is fixed, and it contains different cuisines. Medical facilities are available. Different sports and games like football, cricket, hockey, basketball, badminton, chess, carrom, etc. are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. CSE in Data Science - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college has very good infrastructure.

content.Placements: There are not many good placements at this college. Last year, the maximum package for the B.Tech. was INR 13,000 per month. But this year, there are four top recruiting companies. And many students were selected for these companies. And now, in some days, there is an Australian company coming only for mechanical students that offers a salary of INR 30,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is so good. There are three buildings for three different courses. In all of them, there is a library. Which is good for students. This college has a fully Wi-Fi campus. Wi-Fi is also available 24 hours a day, seven days a week in the hostel. The food in the mess is also good. But the food in the canteen is not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Value for money, if you take admission in B.Tech .

content.Placements: There are no placements, only internship companies came for paid and free. But mostly they do not provide money for internship. There are only 12 students in my batch of 2019-2023. If we talk about placement, some non IT company come to college which only offers sales.
content.Infrastructure: If we talk about hostel infrastructure, that is so good and is well structured and food which we get in hostel is better than other colleges. In a week you will get non veg twice and for veg paneer is made. There is Wi-Fi and canteen facility which are the best. Gym is also there which is also good .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. CSE in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college has excellent facilities.

content.Placements: It is one of the best colleges in Dehradun. I recommend all students get admitted to this college. Top recruiting companies visited our campus. Almost 30 students out of 100 were placed.
content.Infrastructure: Student life at this college was excellent because all facilities were available. They provided Wi-Fi, comfortable beds, and delicious food. There were two different houses, one for boys and another for girls. There was laundry available.
content.Faculty: All teachers at this college were extremely helpful in every way. They were highly qualified and extremely knowledgeable. The semester exams were very difficult. The college conducted semester exams very strictly. The pass percentage was 33%.

admission_process.title: Maya Group of Colleges Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Maya Group of Colleges admissions 2025 are open for various courses at the UG and PG level. Maya Group of Colleges admits students based on various national-level entrance exam and as per last educational qualification. The mode of application is online. The admission for all courses is based on merit and state/central university counselling.

The college offers a range of undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma courses in the streams of Engineering, Management, Beauty & Fitness, and Science.Maya Group of Colleges courseadmissions 2025 will be based on various national-level entrance exam scores as per course requirements. Popular courses offered by the colleges are BPharma, BEd, BHM, BSc, BTech. Read on to know more aboutMaya Group of Collegescourse admissions 2025.

The college offers more than 11 courses across various specialisations and aspirants need to apply for courses through the official website. Candidates can read the table below to learn more on Maya Group of Colleges admission 2025 from the table presented below:

Mode of study

https://maya.edu.in/

The college offers courses in the fields of Engineering,Management, Beauty & Fitness,Scienceetc. Students seeking admission must meet the course-specific eligibility and selection conditions. The below-mentioned table carries course-wise eligibility and selection criteria for Maya Group of Colleges course admissions 2025:
Eligibility
The admission process at Maya Group of Colleges is divided into three parts. The detailed three admission process is mentioned below:
Eligibility:Each course has different eligibility criteria. Candidates can check all the course details on the official website
Admission Process:Admission is based on merit and state/central university counselling. Students must appear in the entrance examination

Application Process:The prospectus and application form can be obtained from the Admission Office at Selaqui, Dehradun against payment of INR 750 through cash or Demand Draft drawn in favour of Maya Devi Educational Foundation, payable at Dehradun.

reviews.review_text: Student life at this college was excellent because all facilities were available. They provided Wi-Fi, comfortable beds, and delicious food. There were two different houses, one for boys and another for girls. There was laundry available.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend you to take admission in our college as it is good, but it is not that great.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is great, and it is very big in the area. It has fans in every class. Our hostel is also good for living and other things, and we have extracurricular activities. Our college promotes sports too.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is full of diversity and I would recommend joining here.
reviews.review_text: Course and infrastructure are good in our college. The infrastructure is neat and it has a very good environment for students. Maya Group of Colleges has many courses which might take your interest like, BHM, BBA, MBA, B.Tech, B.Pharma M.Pharma D.Pharma, and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best for overall development in academics, sports and all activities.
reviews.review_text: I am quite sure that our college has one of the best infrastructures in Uttarakhand. All departments are neat and tidy. The campus has a natural environment. Overall, the quality is very good, and it is the best college to enhance our desired skills.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides one of the best infrastructure and facilities in and around Uttarakhand.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides well-equipped classrooms. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The best thing about our college is it owns four well-known hotels in Dehradun and Mussorie, which helps the students to get the best training during their course duration. Our college provides 24-hour power backup facility. Rooms in our hostel are well ventilated. Quality of food served in the mess is of very good. Good medical facilities are available to the students. Our college provides a wide range of sports l...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is amazing as the classrooms are properly equipped with smart class devices and have been constructed so that the visibility is always clear. Classrooms are spacious. The hostel is good with two and three sharing rooms and attached washrooms, so it gives a homely feeling. Food is quite good, and since the college is running B.Sc in agriculture, so the vegetables and other things are organically produced and used in college mess. Food quality is extremely good, and the ...

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good infrastructure and facilities, and I am satisfied with faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. We have a library which has thousands of books to learn. Our college has great furniture, and washrooms are also well-built and taken care of. The hostel is also good, but it is very difficult for south students to adjust to the food.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college as per my knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Good hostel and classrooms, featured labs, good food but you have to compromise if you are coming from any place other than north India as the food is favourable for North Indians. Coming to the facilities in hostel we have Wi-Fi, indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The agriculture land and nursery are available for practical works. The Classroom, library and laboratory are wellnequipped. The food in our mess is average. The Wi-Fi facility is available but very slow internet. The sports events are conducted regularly.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Agriculture land and nursery are available for practical works. The speed of the Wi-Fi facility in our hostel is very slow. The food served in our mess is very bad, but the medical facility is good. Sports events are conducted regularly.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

admission_process.title: Nopany Institute of Management Studies Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: TheNopany Institute of Management Studies admission processbegins with a quick eligibility check. Eligible students can proceed with the next steps. The process includes application, selection & shortlisting, and admission confirmation. Interested students can go through the steps listed below to complete theNIMS Kolkata admission process:
NIMS Kolkata Application Process 2026

The application process at Nopany Institute of Management is completely online. Students must apply on the college's official website for their desired programme. While filling the application form, students have to provide academic and personal details. To submit the form, students have to pay INR 2,500 as an application fees. Some documents need to be updated in the given format and size.
Selection Rounds 2026

Nopany Institute of Management Studies admissions are entirely merit-based. Students are admitted based on their merit of Class 12 for BBA, BBA (HM) and BCA programmes. It is mandatory to submit the relevant scorecard at the time of filling the application form.
Final Admission
After the completion of all the selection rounds, students are required to pay a certain amount for their selected programme as perthe Nopany Institute of Management Studies fee structure.

TheNIMS Kolkata fee structureincluded different components. These include tuition fees, library fees, caution deposit, international exam fees, college kit fees, and more. Some of these are charged only once at the time of admission. The remaining charges can be paid each semester. Students can pay the amount through the online payment link at the official site. reviews.review_heading: Affordable BBA course with decent placements and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college has AC classrooms, smart boards, Wi-Fi, a big library, and a modern computer lab. Food in the canteen is good and clean. Sports and basic medical facilities are also available. In the canteen, you can also get options like if you are vegetarian or non-vegetarian, and if you are comfortable, you can have both. There are options like Chinese, South Indian, luchi puris, momos, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nopany Institute of Management Studies.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available. We have labs for practical purposes. Sports are available. Our college has a library, smart classrooms, and a canteen. The quality of the food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good facilities and teachers are concerned about students' careers.
reviews.review_text: The computer lab is equipped with good hardware. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The library is huge and many books are available in the library. A variety of food is available in the canteen with good taste and quantity. Our college hosts an annual sports day that includes both outdoor and indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: All about nopany institute of management studies.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of NIMS is very good and comfortable. AC facility is also there in classes with smart classrooms, Wi-Fi facilities, big library room with lots of books where student can study peacefully. Canteen is also there in NIMS food quality is average. Every year sports are also organise for students where they play with their friends and enjoy.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nopany Institute of Management Studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Wi-Fi is also available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure of this college is so good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is so good with good air conditioned room and Wi-Fi. Library is so peaceful, where students can study properly. Students get quality time to study. Lab facility is also there for students betterment. Canteen is also available for faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Classrooms are very good and clean. Classrooms are equipped with Wi-Fi and air-conditioners. Labs and a library are available. The canteen is good and it serves food at reasonable prices.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure provided in our college are good. All the rooms are well-designed and arranged for study. Labs are well-designed. Our campus provides good Wi-Fi facilities. Library rooms are well-arranged with a very good study environment.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nopany Institute of Management Studies.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, Wi-Fi, library, and labs are good. I visited the hostel sometimes. Our college provides PG services for students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nopany Institute of Management Studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Wi-Fi facility and 2 high-tech labs are provided. Classrooms and labs are air-conditioned. Library facility is available for students to study peacefully. Canteen is avaialble. The quality of the food served is very good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: All about Nopany Institute of Management Studies.
reviews.review_text: NIMS is a premium college and its infrastructure is also good. It has a premium and well maintained and updated library with over 4000 the latest edition books, a college canteen where good quality foods are served, carrying forward with a computer lab.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nopany Institute of Management Studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of NIMS is excellent. They provide their students with the best facilities so that they can learn and grow in their careers. Our college has a huge library, classrooms, a canteen, and labs. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Students can enjoy themselves with their friends and create memories.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of its friendly faculty members.
reviews.review_text: In this college, a library, computer, laboratories, and Wi-Fi are provided. Sports and games activities are good. Mess is average, and the medical facilities are provided. In the library, students have all books. The infrastructure is good and very well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: A college with good education and guidance .
reviews.review_text: The college does not provide a hostel facility, there is only a college, and the college rooms are small but the auditorium is big. Free Wi-Fi is available and all classrooms have air conditioning. There are a library and computer labs in the college. The medical facility is available anytime.

reviews.review_heading: It is quite a good college with great opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Our college doesn't have a hostel, but the infrastructure is quite good. We have high-speed Wi-Fi. There are good labs, and we have a vast library with lots of books.

paragraphs: Nopany Institute of Management Studies fees has to be paid in the given time. The institute offers three courses and the fees for all three programmes is different. Check below to know about the Nopany Institute of Management Studies fees:
Note: This is taken from official sources and can change.

Yes, Nopany Institute of Management Studies does offer scholarship schemes to eligible students. The institute offers Merit-cum-Means scholarships for eligible students. Students can contact the Nopany Institute of Management Studies team to know more.

The total fee for the BBA programme at Nopany Institute of Management Studies (NIMS) ranges from INR 3 to 3.4 lakh for the entire course. This amount typically covers tuition, administrative costs, and other academic-related expenses. However, this does not include optional costs such as books, examination fees, or extracurricular activities, which may add to the total cost.

highlights.summary:
The CUET UG 2026 registration portal is now closed for School of Biosciences, Apeejay Stya University admission to several UG courses. The CUET exam 2026 will be conducted from May 11 to May 31, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: School of Biosciences (SBS), Apeejay Stya University offers several courses in various specialisations, such as: five-year Integrated BTech+MTech in Biotechnology (30 intake), four-year BTech in Biotechnology (10 intake), BSc in Medical Lab Technology (20 intake), two-year MSc in Biotechnology (5 intake) and Clinical Research (10 intake) and one-year PG Diploma in Clinical Research and Data Management (5 intake). With its unique Liberal Arts approach, students also get the freedom to choose their own minor subjects from a wide-ranging subject of Liberal Arts courses and pursue specialisation in Biotechnology.

reviews_list.batch_info: Integrated B.Tech. + M.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: School of Biosciences and an Honest Introspection

review_content.Placements: Internships and training start from the first year. Almost all students gain placements, with packages varying from 6-14 LPA, but it all depends on the skillset and experience of the students. Top roles include positions in the private sector, research and development, as well as recognized government institutions.
review_content.Infrastructure: The labs have optimum equipment and everything one needs for the coursework. There is Wi-Fi on campus as well as in the library. The hostels are clean, and the mess and canteen serve nice food with a good ambiance. There are courts for basketball, football, and volleyball, along with spacious fields for other sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: Integrated B.Tech. + M.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Apeejay stya university - department of biosciences.

review_content.Placements: In biotechnology, almost all the students received placements. The highest package offered till now is 33 Lacs and the lowest package is 4 LPA. Placement is very good. Every year, students get placed in reputed and renowned companies. The course curriculum is excellent.
review_content.Infrastructure: Many facilities are available in the college including Wi-Fi, and multiple labs for various purposes. Classrooms and smart classrooms, a library for the readers, and e-library are available. Hostel is okay but it has good facilities and mess food. The mess food is also made quite hygienically. Sports and games require enhancement.

faqs.answer: The core subjects are usually the same. Though the electives differ. Some of the major ones taught are - English, History, Psychology, Political Science, Philosophy, Social work, Economics, Sociology, Anthropology, Rural Studies, and more. Bachelor of Arts is a 3 year program. It can be pursued full-time, part-time, or through distance learning.Click to know aboutBA Subjects and Specialisations.
faqs.question: Q: What are the subjects taught in BA?

faqs.answer: Humanities as a stream provides a wide range of courses that can be studied after completing their 12th grade. Pursuing any of these degrees prepares you to understand the various levels of humanities and, as a result, carve out an appropriate job path. Candidates in the humanities can apply for positions in the government sector, such as banking firms, government ministries, legal firms, and political analysts.Content Writer, Civil Services, Human Resource Manager, Defense Services, Lawyer, Journalist, Counsellor, and Therapist positions are available. As freshers, humanities graduates can expect to earn between INR 2-6 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: How is BTech Biotechnology as a career?
overview_faqs.answer: A career in Biotechnology can be promising and rewarding, and pursuing a Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) in Biotechnology can open up various opportunities in both the industrial and research sectors. Here are some common job profiles that individuals with a B.Tech in Biotechnology might pursue along with their estimates salary packages:Job ProfilesAverage Placement PackageBiotechnologist/Research ScientistINR 8 LPABioprocess EngineerINR 4.5 LPAClinical Research AssociateINR 4.1 LPABioinformatics AnalystINR 5.3 LPAQuality Control/Quality Assurance AnalystINR 4.5 LPAPharmaceutical/Biotech Sales and MarketingINR 6 LPANOTE: The above mentioned salaries have been taken from Ambitionbox; therefore it may vary in future.

review_summary.college_name: School of Biosciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good education and facilities.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students get placement. The highest package is 50,000, and the lowest is 20,000. Apollo, Path Labs, and Medanta are some of the top recruiters. The college provides sessions for placement, self-improvement, how to give interviews, and how to update LinkedIn profiles.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all the facilities like labs (biochemistry, anatomy, microbiology, etc.). Our college has Wi-Fi, a library, smart classrooms, etc. In sports, we have a badminton court, basketball court, volleyball court, and cricket grounds. The university has a dance, music, and multipurpose hall as well.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated B.Tech. + M.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I already summarised the whole summary of my campus above.

content.Placements: Students who pass their degree with an A grade will be able to be placed. The highest and lowest packages depend on a student's work, experience, certificates, and projects. We offer top companies like Oracle and cloud computing companies. With a 4.3 CGPA, students got the best placements in the best companies. The top role is manager.
content.Infrastructure: They provide us with a full Wi-Fi connection across the whole campus. A library is also provided, along with some labs for engineering students, like an Oracle lab and a cloud computing lab. Facilities are very good in the hostel; they provide completely hygienic food to hostelers, with a proper, healthy diet, and all the facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated B.Tech. + M.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall, It's a decent college.

content.Placements: The placement chances are okay, but we have to make our contacts work for a good or better placement. We got an internship in Pathkind Labs recently due to our new CRC. We recently got a new CRC appointed, and he is genuine, and we hope to get better placements.
content.Infrastructure: In my view, the infrastructure is decent with a library, green campus, gym, dance room, music room, a stock shop for stationary needs, and a canteen. We have Wi-Fi all over the campus, and as I live in the hostel, it is pretty decent, and prices are also not that high.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college in every aspect if you are looking for a high-class university.
reviews.review_text: It does not have a great infrastructure. The campus is broad and hostel facilities are separately available for both boys and girls. Wi-Fi is available for the entire campus and hostel. Library is filled with all course-related books. Mess food is also below average. There is a small CCD outlet available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the teachers, good infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities were always fine to help students to resolve the problems. Laboratories were good, and had some good instruments, and classrooms and library were always clean. It provides good space and discipline. The canteen was decent and medical facilities and sports games were also good. Every year they conduct sports day to explore more or get active as well apart from the study.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good campus, good placements and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides  24x7 free unlimited Wi-Fi facility for students. Our college provides a good hostel facility with good rooms. Classrooms are good and equipped with the air-conditioned facility. The library is huge, with a lot of books. The sports ground is huge. Eating facility is also good here. Medical facilities are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the supporting faculty members, good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: We have fully enabled Wi-Fi campus, well - equipped labs and also have online study portal. Hostel facilities are also good with sports facility where tournaments are organised and students are encouraged and taken to state and national levels.

reviews.review_heading: Quite satisfied. The college provides a good learning environment.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and location is actually good, lavish greenery. Library is equipped with all the required books and books are also available. Hostel food quality is better as compare to other hostels, medical facilities are also available 24/7. Badminton court, basketball other sports court as well as gym facility is available. The hostel is within the campus and perfect place to live.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with college, and it is pollution-free.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available on the campus. There are air-conditioning classrooms with Wi-Fi connectivity. Hostel food is very good, but the hostel fee is quite high. There is a peaceful environment inside the hostel, and there is no noise from outside. Medical facilities are available in the hostel as well as on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Apeejay Stya University - An overview.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in all classes, labs and library. Well-equipped labs with competent lab assistants are available along with a well arrayed library. There is an indoor canteen, an outdoor canteen along with a Cafe Coffee Day on the campus. Tournaments are organised yearly for the benefit of students. I do not avail the hostel facility, and hence cannot speak on that front.

reviews.review_heading: College was good for studies, but I am not highly satisfied.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities in departments like analytical instruments. Wi-Fi is available in classrooms as well as the library. The hostel was not fantastic, but it was nice. Qualities of food were nice. Canteens were good with the availability of good and hygienic food.

reviews.review_heading: Apeejay stya university - an overview of 49years in the field of education.
reviews.review_text: We have well-equipped labs, and fully Wi-Fi enabled campus. We also have online study portal of our college. Games are good, and the hostel amenities are also good. Tournaments are organised, and students are taken to national level sports tournaments to give them the exposure of the game and the level.

highlights.summary: A renowned institution of higher learning, Vidya Knowledge Park has its roots in Meerut, Uttar Pradesh since 2007. A leading institute in the city known for its course of a PG Degree in Full Time mode. Vidya Knowledge Park is a well-known institution for MBA/PGDM. Institute gives opportunity to gain professional level expertize through its trained and experienced faculty in the fields of Business & Management Studies. Reputed approving body like AICTE has recognized and approved course offerred by Vidya Knowledge Park. Course offered by Vidya Knowledge Park are available for a total of 120 aspiring candidates at affordable fees. Institute has good facilities all around the campus like Cafeteria, Gym, Hospital / Medical Facilities, Boys Hostel, Girls Hostel, Labs, Library, Shuttle Service, Sports Complex, Wi-Fi Campus.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fee structure for the Vidya Knowledge Park programmes is around INR 25,000 to 5,96,000.

hostel_campus.college_name: Vidya Knowledge Park Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and management.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well-maintained, and the classrooms are also kept in good condition. A canteen is available, along with medical facilities. The library is well-maintained, and there are sports competitions, including cricket, kho, etc.

reviews.review_heading: There is a very good environment in our college.
reviews.review_text: There are well-clean and managed labs in every department. There is Wi-Fi in every department. There are all Wi-Fi departments.

reviews.review_heading: Very best college and good placement.
reviews.review_text: Online projectors and board are available. AC rooms are there. Hostels are just neat and clean. Students are very happy and many more things. I want to tell you about my college where the words are least for memories.

reviews.review_heading: Well satisfied because of faculty. Really good hostel with AC rooms.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities like free 24/7 Wi-Fi, digital boards in classrooms, smart classes, and AC classrooms. The college also available hostels for students, which have good infrastructure and good facilities like well and good rooms with air conditioning, water coolers, and washrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good. I am obsessed with my college infrastructure. The conditions are so good, the teachers are very good, and the ACs are provided in every class. The smart boards are also in every classroom, which helps for a great learning experience.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend students to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was very good. Hostels were better. Internet facility was available 24X7. Laboratory was very good. Our campus was eco-friendly.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Meerut.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is huge with much greenery and is fully Wi-Fi enabled. Canteen and mess are available. The quality of facilities provided is good. Food served is tasty. Medical facilities and all the sports are available. It has a large stadium and gym facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The building is this college is beautiful. The classrooms are clean and beautiful. Laboratories are clean and fully air-conditioning. I feel productive there and satisfied with the infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of the vibe, but it has good placements in Meerut.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. We have a huge campus, but we can't get full exposure to it. Although we have a sports complex, we lack a system. Because of this, we can't get access to sports activities and co-curricular activities. We have a library and a computer lab on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vidya Knowledge Park, Meerut.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi isn't available for students and labs are available at good management. The classrooms are good and the library has a good collection of books. There is a hostel facility in our college with good management and three canteens along with a sports complex are available. There is good medical facility as well.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty are bad, and I suggest choosing a college that provides good education.
reviews.review_text: Vidya Knowledge Park is one of the most popular colleges in Meerut because of its infrastructure. They have the best infrastructure in Meerut. The hostels are available for both boys and girls, with proper facilities. There are 3 different canteens for different departments.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good facilities and canteen food.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities and infrastructure like good Wi-Fi connection, maintained clean laboratories with the proper working of all the computers, every classroom has a smart class with, and clean discipline environment, maximum type of book students need during the course available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college in Meerut city.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are good for the fee they ask. The library is pretty decent and has books on different subjects in a huge number. Our college provides students parking for two-wheelers only, and no student car is allowed inside the campus. Still, there is plenty of space outside where you can park your four-wheeler easily.

reviews.review_heading: Cheap and best is vidya.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite impressive and greenery all around the college. We have different labs and activity places. I was a day scholar, can't review hostel much but food was amazing in hostel and we have 4 canteens altogether in college and one canteen is separately run by the famous ex contestant of MasterChef India MS nisha.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the best faculty members and a good placement department.
reviews.review_text: Vidya Knowledge Park has a beautiful new building, and everything which students possibly need is available here. Our college has an amazing library, computer rooms, moot courts, practical rooms, refreshment areas, lecture theatre, NSS room, first-aid rooms, etc. Our college also has a clean canteen and a temple. A swimming pool is also available here.

reviews_list.batch_info: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Our campus has an extraordinary students and doctors involving in all activities.

review_content.Placements: In our college, they provide internships for one year for all final-year students and about 40% of students will get internships according to their marks. If anyone fails to get an internship, they will write the supplementary exams and get an internship at the college, where they will provide scholarships for interns. Our college has its own hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the classes are smart classrooms. There are neat and clean classrooms. Each subject has its own lab. The labs are very good and useful for our studies. The college provides a hostel facility for a fee of INR 12,000 per year. The food is very nice. The canteen food was also good. If we have any physical issues or illnesses, they provide hospital facilities at our college hospital.

college_info.intro: Sree Abirami College of Pharmacy popular programme is BPharma. It is a job-oriented undergraduate degree programme available for Science students. It is a four-year programme which comprises the manufacture, quality control, research and development of drugs, and others. reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the college infrastructure, hostel, teaching.

review_content.Placements: MBBS depended on skills. There were doctors who trained us. We practiced a lot. As first-year students, coaching was the best, and patient flow to the hospital was also high. To improve knowledge, many CMEs were conducted, and many professors participated in them.
review_content.Infrastructure: The new medical college was the best, with best infrastructure. Classrooms were fully ventilated and had comfortable desks. Each class had a projector and all necessary equipment. Facilities like the dissection room with adequate cadavers and the hematology lab with sufficient microscopes, etc., were available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The college has really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students from our college get distinctions in university exams. We have a hospital near the college, which is very useful and helpful for the students to practice and learning, etc. From every batch of our college get 100% pass marks with maximum distinctions.
review_content.Infrastructure: The rooms are well-developed and cleaned. Hostel rooms and restrooms are really good compared with other colleges. The classrooms in the college are very big and have enough fans. The college includes separate labs for every department with advanced equipment. In the hostel, they provide a separate track for every student.

highlights.summary: Founded in 2022, Dr. Preeti Global University is an university. It is located in Indore, Madhya Pradesh. Dr. Preeti Global University provides UG, PG and Certificate courses in Full Time mode. It provides 92 courses across specialisations such as Agriculture, Biotechnology, Botany, Chemistry and Civil Engineering. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. Dr. Preeti Global University fees ranges between INR 12,000 to 2,40,000. Dr. Preeti Global University offers these course across fields such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce and Mass Communication & Media. Dr. Preeti Global University offers all the campus facilities to students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. The Dr. Preeti Global University course fee ranges between INR 12,000 to 2,40,000.

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

paragraphs:
Dr. Preeti Global University course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theDr. Preeti Global Universityapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG, PG, After 10th and Certificate programmes in fields of Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Mass Communication and Media, Law, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Science, Teaching and Education and Nursing, and more. To know about the eligibility of Dr. Preeti Global University courses, students can visit the website.

Dr. Preeti Global University fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. The mode of payment for Dr. Preeti Global University fees is online. Interested candidates can check below for more details on Dr. Preeti Global University admission:

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

placements.overview: UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 53 students were admitted at The Dale View College of Pharmacy and Research Centre and 40 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 40 students 23 were placed with median salary of INR 190000 and 9 students opted for higher studies. A total of 49 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at The Dale View College of Pharmacy and Research Centreand 38 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 38 students 22 were placed with median salary of INR 190000 and 12 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 4 students were admitted at The Dale View College of Pharmacy and Research Centre and 4 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 4 students 4 were placed with median salary of INR 88000. A total of 5 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at The Dale View College of Pharmacy and Research Centreand 5 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 5 students 5 were placed with median salary of INR 110000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good and we get all facilities in this college.

review_content.Placements: In my course, 90% of students were placed. The highest package was INR 15,00,000, and the lowest package was INR 2,00,000. 40% of students got internships from the college in various companies. Top recruiters in my course were Zydus and Sun Pharma. The top role offered in my course was managing director.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college has all the facilities that a student needs, including wifi, labs, classrooms, a library, and a garden. The hostel facility is very good. It provides wifi, clean rooms, proper beds, and fans or air conditioning. However, the hostel food is not very good because they don't use onions or garlic.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely amazing infrastructure and best supportive faculty members throughout the year.

review_content.Placements: Basically it's been a very good college and it gives you placement according to your academic results throughout the last year and in reputed companies. Its been never dissatisfaction from any student regarding placement because it gives you what you worth deserve.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good environment with big play area with 2 cricket nets and one playground with rcc pitch for cricket lover and next ground for volleyball. It has good mess food and hostel facility. Best day to eat out is Sunday. Good food and no any dissatisfaction regarding this all.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is good and we get all facilities in this college.

content.Placements: In my course, 90% of students were placed. The highest package was INR 15,00,000, and the lowest package was INR 2,00,000. 40% of students got internships from the college in various companies. Top recruiters in my course were Zydus and Sun Pharma. The top role offered in my course was managing director.
content.Infrastructure: My college has all the facilities that a student needs, including wifi, labs, classrooms, a library, and a garden. The hostel facility is very good. It provides wifi, clean rooms, proper beds, and fans or air conditioning. However, the hostel food is not very good because they don't use onions or garlic.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely amazing infrastructure and best supportive faculty members throughout the year.

content.Placements: Basically it's been a very good college and it gives you placement according to your academic results throughout the last year and in reputed companies. Its been never dissatisfaction from any student regarding placement because it gives you what you worth deserve.
content.Infrastructure: Good environment with big play area with 2 cricket nets and one playground with rcc pitch for cricket lover and next ground for volleyball. It has good mess food and hostel facility. Best day to eat out is Sunday. Good food and no any dissatisfaction regarding this all.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Gramin Technical and Management Campus is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, BHMCT and UG Diploma. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MBA/PGDM and MCA. faqs.answer: A:    Gramin Technical and Management Campus has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityAfter 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th Std./ SSC examination or its equivalent, with at least 35% aggregate marks.UG DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th Std./ SSC examination or its equivalent, with at least 35% aggregate marks.BHMCTCandidate must have passed 10+2 or its equivalent examination and obtained at least mentioned marks in aggregate(at least 40% marks in aggregate for backward class category, Economically Weaker Section and Persons with Disabilities candidates belonging to Maharashtra state only).B.E. / B.TechCandidate who have passed Diploma in Engineering & Technology & obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks for Backward class, EWS & PWD candidates belonging to Maharashtra State only) can also apply.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Gramin Technical and Management Campus for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer: Gramin Technical and Management Campus has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityAfter 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th Std./ SSC examination or its equivalent, with at least 35% aggregate marks.UG DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th Std./ SSC examination or its equivalent, with at least 35% aggregate marks.BHMCTCandidate must have passed 10+2 or its equivalent examination and obtained at least mentioned marks in aggregate(at least 40% marks in aggregate for backward class category, Economically Weaker Section and Persons with Disabilities candidates belonging to Maharashtra state only).B.E. / B.TechCandidate who have passed Diploma in Engineering & Technology & obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks for Backward class, EWS & PWD candidates belonging to Maharashtra State only) can also apply.

hostel_campus.college_name: Gramin Shikshan Prasarak Mandal College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The Institute has 4 hostels facility with capacity of 430 students

library.description: Institute has 1 well equipped library with 81186 books and 37 Journals
Institute has 1 well equipped library with 81186 books and 37 Journals

hostel.description: The Institute has 4 hostels facility with capacity of 430 students

reviews.review_heading: This college has good placements and really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college is good in facilities and infrastructure available in my department like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library. In the hostel, all types of facilities are available in the hostel. There is 24-hour security available. Mess provides fresh food. In my college, sports are also arranged at the Olympic level.

reviews.review_heading: Quality education best course to do
reviews.review_text: The main motto of the college was to give students quality education. Infrastructure is average. Sports are also conducted. Overall, the whole thing is good if we ignore the infrastructure. Sports like kabaddi, cricket, kho-kho, and many others are available for students to enjoy.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with discipline.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the food they deliver in the canteen is not that good; we can tell that it is average considering one's health. The infrastructure of the college is good. Some labs are provided with Wi-Fi. The labs are good. Classrooms are sometimes dirty.

reviews.review_heading: Overall good college according to discipline.
reviews.review_text: The faculty is okay in our college, and there are game and sports facilities. Hostel conditions are not excellent, lacking certain facilities. However, the hostel mess provides tasty and good food. The overall impression of the college is satisfactory, although the canteen may not be the best.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good education.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were very good. The hostel fee was Rs 6,000 per month. Wi-Fi was not available in our college. All labs were average. All machines were not according to the new research. We had a good library. Hostels were not good in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Our college has many labs like Linux lab, AWT lab, database lab, etc. Our college has a library. The hostel facility is available in our college. The food served in the hostel and canteen is good. Our college provides us with various sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good teachers and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility offered in our college is fine. Labs are also fine. We play table tennis, badminton, kho-kho, volleyball, and football. There are 4 libraries with many books. The seating arrangements are not perfect or comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: Very strict college with average infrastructure and faculty members, and don't expect placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides average hostel, and infrastructure is poor.

reviews.review_heading: Our college students get good placement every year because our faculty is very educated.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has no power outages, an internet connection, Wi-Fi routers on every floor and hall, and our classrooms are very large and beautiful, making them ideal for studying. Digital screens are available in every classroom, and our faculty members are extremely friendly.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members but not good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college was the biggest campus on Delhi University's north campus. It had different societies and four lawns. Our college had a huge library where students study and read books. Our college had facilities for sports like football, basketball, and other sports.
